interaction_context: Two entities are aligning on whether a shared claim can move toward boundary review.
declared_relationship_context: Both entities acknowledge the same scope and can defer commitment without penalty.
trust_relevance: Supports witness and delegation review without treating trust as execution authority.
boundary_relevance: Supports later BCAT review because the interaction can be reconstructed and scoped.
limitations: This is a declared relationship-context profile, not certification of either entity.
This profile does not grant execution authority by itself.
